# services.galene

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.galene`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.galene.certFile` | `null or absolute path` | Path to the server's certificate. The file is copied at runtime to Galene's data directory where it needs to reside. |
| `services.galene.dataDir` | `absolute path` | Data directory. |
| `services.galene.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Galene Service. |
| `services.galene.group` | `string` | Group under which galene runs. |
| `services.galene.groupsDir` | `absolute path` | Web server directory. |
| `services.galene.httpAddress` | `string` | HTTP listen address for galene. |
| `services.galene.httpPort` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | HTTP listen port. |
| `services.galene.insecure` | `boolean` | Whether Galene should listen in http or in https. If left as the default value (false), Galene needs to be fed a private key and a certificate. |
| `services.galene.keyFile` | `null or absolute path` | Path to the server's private key. The file is copied at runtime to Galene's data directory where it needs to reside. |
| `services.galene.package` | `package` | The galene package to use. |
| `services.galene.recordingsDir` | `absolute path` | Recordings directory. |
| `services.galene.stateDir` | `absolute path` | The directory where Galene stores its internal state. If left as the default value this directory will automatically be created before the Galene server starts, otherwise the sysadmin is responsible for ensuring the directory exists with appropriate ownership and permissions. |
| `services.galene.staticDir` | `absolute path` | Web server directory. |
| `services.galene.turnAddress` | `string` | Built-in TURN server listen address and port. Set to "" to disable. |
| `services.galene.user` | `string` | User account under which galene runs. |
